# Reference

<!-- DO NOT EDIT: This document was generated by Puppet Strings -->

## Table of Contents

### Classes

* [`wombat::cluster`](#wombat--cluster): module to manage and configure wombat
* [`wombat::compactor`](#wombat--compactor): module to install wombat compactor
* [`wombat::compactor::uploads`](#wombat--compactor--uploads): wrapper for the upload of compactor files using puppet-file_upload module
* [`wombat::config`](#wombat--config): creates configuration for wombat environment
* [`wombat::datastore`](#wombat--datastore): install wombat tools and configuration for wombat datastore processing
* [`wombat::datastore::primary`](#wombat--datastore--primary): class to ensure postgress is configured as the primary database
* [`wombat::datastore::standby`](#wombat--datastore--standby): class to ensure postgress is configured as the standby database
* [`wombat::grafana`](#wombat--grafana): installs the required configuration files for grafana
* [`wombat::rssac_report`](#wombat--rssac_report): installs the required files for the rssac publishing

### Data types

* [`Wombat::Capture_data`](#Wombat--Capture_data): Data types for capture data
* [`Wombat::Compactor::Upload`](#Wombat--Compactor--Upload): A type to describe the configuration for uploading files to a remote host
* [`Wombat::Listen_interfaces`](#Wombat--Listen_interfaces): Data type for listen_interfaces parameter
* [`Wombat::Logger`](#Wombat--Logger): Wombat logger type
* [`Wombat::Synchronous_commit`](#Wombat--Synchronous_commit): Synchronous commit mode

Data type: `String[1]`

file system user

Data type: `Stdlib::Unixpath`

path to the schema DDLs

Data type: `Boolean`

a boolean allow puppet to perform a schema update, if available

##### <a name="-wombat--compactor--disk_usage_watermark"></a>`disk_usage_watermark`

Data type: `Integer`

percentage of disk usage to trigger compaction

##### <a name="-wombat--compactor--disk_file_aging"></a>`disk_file_aging`

Data type: `Integer`

number of days to keep files

##### <a name="-wombat--compactor--promiscuous_mode"></a>`promiscuous_mode`

Data type: `Boolean`

enable promiscuous mode

##### <a name="-wombat--compactor--rotation_period"></a>`rotation_period`

Data type: `Integer[60,3600]`

period to rotate files

##### <a name="-wombat--compactor--max_output_size"></a>`max_output_size`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

maximum output size

Data type: `Boolean`

array of capture data

array of ip addresses

##### <a name="-wombat--compactor--listen_interfaces"></a>`listen_interfaces`

Data type: `Optional[Wombat::Listen_interfaces]`

array of listen interfaces

##### <a name="-wombat--compactor--filter"></a>`filter`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

filter to use

Data type: `ENUM['gzip','xz']`

compression type

##### <a name="-wombat--compactor--compression_level"></a>`compression_level`

compression level

pcap compression level

database user

database password

Data type: `Optional[Stdlib::Host]`

if present use the specified database host

Data type: `Array[Stdlib::Host]`

list of clickhouse servers

Data type: `Stdlib::Unixpath`

directory to store the clickhouse DB

##### <a name="-wombat--config--clickhouse_import_server"></a>`clickhouse_import_server`

Data type: `Stdlib::Host`

server to use for clickhouse imports

##### <a name="-wombat--config--clickhouse_node_shard_default"></a>`clickhouse_node_shard_default`

Data type: `String[1]`

mode to use for node shard selection

##### <a name="-wombat--config--clickhouse_user"></a>`clickhouse_user`

Data type: `String[1]`

clickhouse user

##### <a name="-wombat--config--clickhouse_pass"></a>`clickhouse_pass`

Data type: `String[1]`

clickhouse password

##### <a name="-wombat--config--loggers"></a>`loggers`

Data type: `Hash[String[1], Wombat::Logger]`

Hash of logger configueration

##### <a name="-wombat--config--pcap_compress"></a>`pcap_compress`

Data type: `Boolean`

boolean enable compression (default=true)

##### <a name="-wombat--config--compression_level"></a>`compression_level`

Data type: `Integer[1,9]`

compression level to use (default=2)

##### <a name="-wombat--config--anonymisation_passphrase"></a>`anonymisation_passphrase`

Data type: `Optional[String[1]]`

if present use this password for anonimisation

##### <a name="-wombat--config--rssac_url"></a>`rssac_url`

Data type: `Stdlib::HTTPUrl`

Grafana URL to use when generating the RSSAC report charts

##### <a name="-wombat--config--rssac_outdir"></a>`rssac_outdir`

Data type: `Stdlib::Unixpath`

output base directoy for the RSSAC reports hierarchy

##### <a name="-wombat--config--rssac_server"></a>`rssac_server`

Data type: `String[1]`

server to query for node addresses

##### <a name="-wombat--config--rssac_zone"></a>`rssac_zone`

Data type: `String[1]`

zone to listen for NOTIFY messages from

##### <a name="-wombat--config--rssac_load_time_threshold"></a>`rssac_load_time_threshold`

Data type: `Integer[1,100]`

percentage of quorum needed to generate the rssac report (default=95)

##### <a name="-wombat--config--maxmind_license_key"></a>`maxmind_license_key`

Data type: `Optional[String[1]]`

MaxMind Database key for GEO info in Wombat

##### <a name="-wombat--config--user"></a>`user`

Data type: `String[1]`

to be running the wombat services as

##### <a name="-wombat--config--data_user"></a>`data_user`

Data type: `String[1]`

owner of the data files

### <a name="wombat--datastore"></a>`wombat::datastore`

install wombat tools and configuration for wombat datastore processing

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `wombat::datastore` class:

* [`packages`](#-wombat--datastore--packages)
* [`archive_dir`](#-wombat--datastore--archive_dir)
* [`standby`](#-wombat--datastore--standby)
* [`enable_rotate`](#-wombat--datastore--enable_rotate)
* [`enable_mirror`](#-wombat--datastore--enable_mirror)
* [`cbor_expiration`](#-wombat--datastore--cbor_expiration)
* [`pcap_expiration`](#-wombat--datastore--pcap_expiration)
* [`cbor_process_cron`](#-wombat--datastore--cbor_process_cron)
* [`services`](#-wombat--datastore--services)
* [`mirror_filters`](#-wombat--datastore--mirror_filters)
* [`wombat_filter_file`](#-wombat--datastore--wombat_filter_file)

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--packages"></a>`packages`

Data type: `Array[String[1]]`

packages to install

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--archive_dir"></a>`archive_dir`

Data type: `Stdlib::Unixpath`

location of archive directory

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--standby"></a>`standby`

Data type: `Boolean`

if this system is a standby or primary DB

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--enable_rotate"></a>`enable_rotate`

Data type: `Boolean`

enables the file rotation and expiration of files

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--enable_mirror"></a>`enable_mirror`

Data type: `Boolean`

Enable to wombat-import-mirror

Default value: `true`

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--cbor_expiration"></a>`cbor_expiration`

Data type: `Integer[1,400]`

specifies a data aging in days for files keep

Default value: `365`

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--pcap_expiration"></a>`pcap_expiration`

Data type: `Integer[1,400]`

specifies a data aging in days for files keep

Default value: `7`

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--cbor_process_cron"></a>`cbor_process_cron`

Data type: `Integer[1,15]`

specifies the frequency for the cfor file detection and file queuing

Default value: `5`

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--services"></a>`services`

Data type: `Array[String[1]]`

array of services to process

Default value: `['IMRS']`

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--mirror_filters"></a>`mirror_filters`

Data type: `Array[String[1]]`

A list of filters for the import mirror

Default value: `[]`

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--wombat_filter_file"></a>`wombat_filter_file`

Data type: `Optional[String[1]]`

source file for wombat filter

Default value: `undef`

### <a name="wombat--datastore--primary"></a>`wombat::datastore::primary`

class to ensure postgress is configured as the primary database

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `wombat::datastore::primary` class:

* [`ipv4_address`](#-wombat--datastore--primary--ipv4_address)
* [`ipv6_address`](#-wombat--datastore--primary--ipv6_address)
* [`replicate`](#-wombat--datastore--primary--replicate)
* [`roles`](#-wombat--datastore--primary--roles)
* [`schema_dir`](#-wombat--datastore--primary--schema_dir)
* [`schema_update`](#-wombat--datastore--primary--schema_update)
* [`synchronous_commit`](#-wombat--datastore--primary--synchronous_commit)
* [`r_min_data_age`](#-wombat--datastore--primary--r_min_data_age)
* [`m_min_data_age`](#-wombat--datastore--primary--m_min_data_age)
* [`threshold`](#-wombat--datastore--primary--threshold)
* [`nodes_update`](#-wombat--datastore--primary--nodes_update)
* [`apps`](#-wombat--datastore--primary--apps)

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--primary--ipv4_address"></a>`ipv4_address`

Data type:

```puppet
Variant[
    Stdlib::IP::Address::V4,
    Array[Stdlib::IP::Address::V4]
  ]
```

ipv4 address to allow for replication

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--primary--ipv6_address"></a>`ipv6_address`

Data type:

```puppet
Variant[
    Stdlib::IP::Address::V6,
    Array[Stdlib::IP::Address::V6]
  ]
```

ipv6 address to allow for replication

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--primary--replicate"></a>`replicate`

Data type: `Boolean`

a boolean setup postgresql replication

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--primary--roles"></a>`roles`

Data type: `Hash[String, Hash]`

a hash of roles to be used with postgresql::server::role

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--primary--schema_dir"></a>`schema_dir`

Data type: `Stdlib::Unixpath`

path to the schema DDLs

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--primary--schema_update"></a>`schema_update`

Data type: `Boolean`

a boolean allow puppet to perform a schema update, if available

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--primary--synchronous_commit"></a>`synchronous_commit`

Data type: `Wombat::Synchronous_commit`

a boolean to enable synchronous commits

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--primary--r_min_data_age"></a>`r_min_data_age`

Data type: `Integer`

integer number of days of raw data to be retained

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--primary--m_min_data_age"></a>`m_min_data_age`

Data type: `Integer`

integer number of days of aggregation data to be retained for 5m aggregation

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--primary--threshold"></a>`threshold`

Data type: `Integer`

integer set disk usage percentage threshold

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--primary--nodes_update"></a>`nodes_update`

Data type: `Boolean`

a boolean allow puppet to perform a nodes update, if available

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--primary--apps"></a>`apps`

Data type: `Array[String]`



Default value: `['lax']`

### <a name="wombat--datastore--standby"></a>`wombat::datastore::standby`

class to ensure postgress is configured as the standby database

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `wombat::datastore::standby` class:

* [`db_host`](#-wombat--datastore--standby--db_host)
* [`db_hostaddr`](#-wombat--datastore--standby--db_hostaddr)
* [`db_username`](#-wombat--datastore--standby--db_username)
* [`db_password`](#-wombat--datastore--standby--db_password)

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--standby--db_host"></a>`db_host`

Data type: `Stdlib::Host`

db server to replicate from

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--standby--db_hostaddr"></a>`db_hostaddr`

Data type: `Array[Stdlib::IP::Address]`

db ip to replicate from

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--standby--db_username"></a>`db_username`

Data type: `String`

db user with replicate permissions

##### <a name="-wombat--datastore--standby--db_password"></a>`db_password`

Data type: `String`

db password with replicate permissions

### <a name="wombat--grafana"></a>`wombat::grafana`

installs the required configuration files for grafana

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `wombat::grafana` class:

* [`basic_auth`](#-wombat--grafana--basic_auth)
* [`basic_auth_user`](#-wombat--grafana--basic_auth_user)
* [`database`](#-wombat--grafana--database)
* [`wombat_cluster_protocol`](#-wombat--grafana--wombat_cluster_protocol)
* [`wombat_cluster_host`](#-wombat--grafana--wombat_cluster_host)
* [`wombat_cluster_port`](#-wombat--grafana--wombat_cluster_port)

##### <a name="-wombat--grafana--basic_auth"></a>`basic_auth`

Data type: `Boolean`

use grafana basicauth default to false

##### <a name="-wombat--grafana--basic_auth_user"></a>`basic_auth_user`

Data type: `Optional[String[1]]`

username to use for basicauth

##### <a name="-wombat--grafana--database"></a>`database`

Data type: `String[1]`

clickhouse database to use

##### <a name="-wombat--grafana--wombat_cluster_protocol"></a>`wombat_cluster_protocol`

Data type: `String[1]`

setup the clickhouse cluster to connection http or https

##### <a name="-wombat--grafana--wombat_cluster_host"></a>`wombat_cluster_host`

Data type: `Stdlib::Host`

setup the host of the clickhouse cluster to query

##### <a name="-wombat--grafana--wombat_cluster_port"></a>`wombat_cluster_port`

Data type: `Integer[1]`

setup the TCP port for the clickhouse cluster to query

### <a name="wombat--rssac_report"></a>`wombat::rssac_report`

installs the required files for the rssac publishing

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `wombat::rssac_report` class:

* [`packages`](#-wombat--rssac_report--packages)
* [`report`](#-wombat--rssac_report--report)
* [`server`](#-wombat--rssac_report--server)
* [`report_file_prefix`](#-wombat--rssac_report--report_file_prefix)
* [`report_server_name`](#-wombat--rssac_report--report_server_name)

##### <a name="-wombat--rssac_report--packages"></a>`packages`

Data type: `Array[String[1]]`

packages to install

##### <a name="-wombat--rssac_report--report"></a>`report`

Data type: `String[1]`

type of report to perform

##### <a name="-wombat--rssac_report--server"></a>`server`

Data type: `String[1]`

server name

##### <a name="-wombat--rssac_report--report_file_prefix"></a>`report_file_prefix`

Data type: `String[1]`

prefix for the generated files

##### <a name="-wombat--rssac_report--report_server_name"></a>`report_server_name`

Data type: `Stdlib::Host`

service FQDN

## Data types

### <a name="Wombat--Capture_data"></a>`Wombat::Capture_data`

Data types for capture data

Alias of `Enum['query-questions', 'query-answers', 'query-authority', 'query-additional', 'response-questions', 'response-answers', 'response-authority', 'response-additional', 'query-all', 'response-all', 'all']`

### <a name="Wombat--Compactor--Upload"></a>`Wombat::Compactor::Upload`

A type to describe the configuration for uploading files to a remote host

Alias of

```puppet
Struct[{
    destination_host    => Stdlib::Host,
    patterns            => Array[String],
    remove_source_files => Boolean,
    ssh_key_source      => Stdlib::Filesource,
    ssh_user            => String[1],
    create_parent       => Boolean,
}]
```

### <a name="Wombat--Listen_interfaces"></a>`Wombat::Listen_interfaces`

Data type for listen_interfaces parameter

Alias of `Variant[Array[String], Enum['any']]`

### <a name="Wombat--Logger"></a>`Wombat::Logger`

Wombat logger type

Alias of

```puppet
Struct[{
    level     => Enum['CRITICAL', 'ERROR', 'WARNING', 'INFO', 'DEBUG'],
    handlers  => String[1],
    qualname  => Optional[String[1]],
    propagate => Optional[Boolean],
}]
```

### <a name="Wombat--Synchronous_commit"></a>`Wombat::Synchronous_commit`

Synchronous commit mode

Alias of `Enum['on', 'remote_apply', 'remote_write']`
